name: nexifyterm
description: NexifyTerm - macOS native terminal with AI integration

scripts.setup: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project NexOperator.xcodeproj -scheme NexOperator -resolvePackageDependencies && echo '✅ Setup complete'
scripts.build: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project NexOperator.xcodeproj -scheme NexOperator -configuration Debug SYMROOT=$(pwd)/build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO 2>&1 | tail -30
scripts.build:release: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project NexOperator.xcodeproj -scheme NexOperator -configuration Release SYMROOT=$(pwd)/build -allowProvisioningUpdates 2>&1 | tail -30
scripts.clean: xcodebuild -project NexOperator.xcodeproj -scheme NexOperator clean 2>&1 | tail -5 && rm -rf build/ && echo '✅ Clean done'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.logs: ls -lt ~/Library/Application\ Support/NexOperator/logs/ 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo 'No session logs yet'
scripts.logs:last: cat "$(ls -t ~/Library/Application\ Support/NexOperator/logs/session_*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No session logs yet'
scripts.logs:open: open ~/Library/Application\ Support/NexOperator/logs/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No logs directory yet'
scripts.build:verbose: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project NexOperator.xcodeproj -scheme NexOperator -configuration Debug SYMROOT=$(pwd)/build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO 2>&1 | tee build.log
